offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 projects/month, budget mismanagement causes cash flow gaps. We provide real-time cost tracking instead of manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on budgeting
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Share insights in construction forums and groups
try_it: Let users test real-time budget tracking on 1-3 projects
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the tool
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
